notes: v1.14.115 - Command assistant entry (Ask PHANTOM prism card) + header mark swap (ghost->shield). BUILD-1 from the restructure mandate, body.rd-only. PART 1: new '.ask gx' button in pg-cmd BELOW the NBA card -> opens the existing Voice Assistant sheet via openVaSheet('listening');vaStart() (mirrors the legacy VA tile @11314; entry/route only, assistant NOT rebuilt; no showPage bounce). Violet (--vio) accent, prism mark (phantom-prism.png) with a faint askBreathe animation (stilled under prefers-reduced-motion), no glow/halo. PART 2: the header overflow-menu button shows phantom-shield.png (28px, gold border kept, behavior/menu UNCHANGED) - kills the 'hollow promise' (button looked like AI but opens settings); now header=system(shield), assistant=prism card. GATE FIX: the shield is shown UNDER body.rd ONLY (.hdr-shield-img + body.rd toggle, mirroring the existing wordmark/logo gate @ body.rd .wmimg) - legacy (?legacy=1) RETAINS the original ghost base64 glyph, byte-identical. (The shared .app-header/.header-right renders in BOTH houses, so an unconditional glyph swap would have leaked the shield into legacy; gating keeps legacy pristine.) Two NEW image assets (phantom-prism.png, phantom-shield.png) added to repo + sw.js PRECACHE_URLS + CACHE_VERSION bumped (offline-first: airplane-mode reload must render both, not broken-image boxes). Legacy ?legacy=1 byte-identical. Reused .gx/SPECTRUM tokens, no new CSS primitives. NOTE: BUILD-2 (inject Ghost-Echo quirks into assistant context) is a SEPARATE ticket - this card only opens the assistant. DEVICE-VERIFY: pg-cmd Ask card below NBA opens VA sheet in-frame; header shield opens same settings menu; AIRPLANE-MODE reload both PNGs render; ?legacy=1 unchanged; no console 404s.
